chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. D – 61 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 15.01.2020 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None appeared for the applicant. The same position was on last two dates of hearing viz. 02.07.2019 and 28.11.2019. Apparently, the applicant is no more interested. Now, it is 10:12 a.m. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No. D-61 of 2019 is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
